name: williams-sound-explorer
description: Browser-based explorer for Williams Defender/Stargate/Robotron sound effects

scripts.prepare:public: mkdir -p public/roms public/data && python3 ../tools/build_glossary.py && python3 ../tools/build_labelmap.py && python3 ../tools/build_explainer_cards.py && python3 ../tools/build_zeropage.py
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:public && npm run build:worklet && concurrently --kill-others --names "worklet,vite" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run watch:worklet" "vite"
scripts.build: npm run prepare:public && npm run build:worklet && vite build
